nexusSimulator.source: local script aligned to NexusSimulator playwright-simtime semantics

roomOffer.title: Red Thread
roomOffer.description: The final response window holds a little longer.

monsterIndex.name: The Still Guest
monsterIndex.sign: One wet footstep repeats from the place you are not looking.
monsterIndex.scare: It reaches the shoulder, swallows the flashlight for three seconds, then waits just outside the returning beam.
monsterIndex.response: Turn toward the footstep and hold the flashlight on its face before the final breath ends.

monsterIndex.name: The Wall Knocker
monsterIndex.sign: Three hollow knocks trade sides whenever it crosses a doorway.
monsterIndex.scare: It kills the light, moves to the opposite wall, and begins a faster answer of knocks.
monsterIndex.response: Follow the new side after the blackout and pin the knocking shape in the beam.

monsterIndex.name: The Rust Mother
monsterIndex.sign: A long metal scrape circles low around the room.
monsterIndex.scare: Her scrape becomes a green pulse before every stolen second of light.
monsterIndex.response: Keep the restored beam steady through the scrape until she unfolds away from it.

monsterIndex.name: The Breath Thief
monsterIndex.sign: Breathing arrives in the wrong ear, closer than the corridor should allow.
monsterIndex.scare: It breathes through the blackout and leaves only a short silence when the light returns.
monsterIndex.response: Use the final breath to choose a side and reveal it before the silence closes.

expedition.lastEvent: The Rust Mother entered Building 3. Listen before you look.
